title: Arm Method, Spel Class
parameters: ArmNumber	Integer expression from 0-15.  The user may select up to 16 different arms.  Arm 0 is the standard (default) robot arm.  Arm(s) 1-15 are auxiliary arms defined by the ArmSet instruction.
description: Sets the current robot arm number.
see_also:
ArmSet, GetArm, Tool

Arm Example

VB Example:

m_spel.Arm(1)

C# Example:

m_spel.Arm(1);
